### [Planning ahead for Windows Server 2016 end of support](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/blog/2026/02/25/planning-ahead-for-windows-server-2016-end-of-support/)

In accordance with the Microsoft Lifecycle Policy, extended support for Windows Server 2016 will end on January 12, 2027.
Author: stclarke
Description: The post [Back by popular demand: Windows Server Summit 2026 coming May 11–13](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/blog/2026/04/20/planning-your-path-to-windows-server-2025-what-organizations-are-prioritizing-in-2026/) appeared first on [Source](https://news.microsoft.com/source).
Title: Back by popular demand: Windows Server Summit 2026 coming May 11–13
